series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: The Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation are records documenting the use, operation, and maintenance of the BWC data processing equipment including operating manuals for hardware and software, hardware/operating system requirements, hardware configurations, and equipment control systems. Reference General Schedule IT-OP-02.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation it is no longer compatible with new up-dated technology used by BWC and all data contained on incompatible Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation has been transferred a medium compatible with current BWC technology ; Paper: Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation it is no longer compatible with new up-dated technology used by BWC and all data contained on incompatible Data Processing Hardware and Software Documentation has been transferred a medium compatible with current BWC technology
